name: La Laguna Rabasa — Circular from Alicante
name_original: La Laguna Rabasa — Circular desde Alicante
region_intro: Easy hiking trails around Central offer a diverse range of landscapes, from coastal paths with sea views to routes around reservoirs and through natural parks. The terrain typically features gentle gradients, making it suitable for various fitness levels. Hikers can explore areas characterized by Mediterranean vegetation, water features, and historical landmarks. The region provides accessible outdoor experiences with varied scenery. Best easy hiking trails around Central The most popular easy hiking route is Albir Lighthouse – Cala de la Mina loop from Parc Natural de la Serra Gelada, a 3.9 miles (6.2 km) trail that takes 1 hour 51 minutes to complete. This route offers coastal views and passes by a lighthouse. Another top favourite among local hikers is Algar Waterfalls Trail, an easy 1.0 mile (1.5 km) path. This trail features natural waterfalls and pools, ideal for a short, refreshing walk. Local hikers also love the La Laguna Rabasa — Circular from Alicante, a 4.0 miles (6.4 km) trail leading through a lagoon area, often completed in about 1 hour 42 minutes. Hiking around Central is defined by coastal paths, reservoir loops, and routes through natural parks. The network offers options for different ability levels, focusing on accessible and enjoyable outdoor experiences. The routes in Central are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.4 stars from more than 5,400 reviews. More than 40,000 hikers have used komoot to explore Central's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many easy hiking trails are available in Central?
A: Central offers a wide selection of easy hiking trails, with over 400 routes specifically categorized as easy. In total, there are more than 900 hiking routes across all difficulty levels in the region.

Q: What kind of landscapes can I expect on easy hikes in Central?
A: Easy hikes in Central feature diverse landscapes, including scenic coastal paths with sea views, tranquil routes around reservoirs, and trails winding through natural parks. You'll encounter Mediterranean vegetation, various water features, and historical landmarks, all with generally gentle gradients.

Q: Are there any easy circular walks in Central?
A: Yes, Central has several easy circular walks. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/40388677" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Albir Lighthouse – Cala de la Mina loop from Parc Natural de la Serra Gelada&lt;/a&gt; offers coastal views, and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e871734789/la-laguna-rabasa-circular-from-alicante" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;La Laguna Rabasa — Circular from Alicante&lt;/a&gt; takes you through a lagoon area. Another popular option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e870546812/circular-walk-in-altea" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Circular walk in Altea&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: Can I find easy hikes with waterfalls in Central?
A: Absolutely! The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e871766394/algar-waterfalls-trail" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Algar Waterfalls Trail&lt;/a&gt; is an excellent easy option, featuring natural waterfalls and refreshing pools, perfect for a short and invigorating walk.

Q: What are some notable landmarks or attractions I can see on easy trails?
A: Many easy trails in Central lead to or pass by interesting landmarks. You can visit the historic &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/607512" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Santa Bárbara Castle&lt;/a&gt; in Alicante, explore the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/284114" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Albir Lighthouse&lt;/a&gt; on a coastal loop, or enjoy views from the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4631931" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Reservoir viewpoint&lt;/a&gt; near Relleu. The region also features several beautiful lakes, such as the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4041337" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Amadorio Reservoir&lt;/a&gt; and &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/2963496" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Rabasa Lagoons&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: Are there family-friendly easy hikes suitable for kids?
A: Yes, many easy trails in Central are suitable for families with children due to their gentle gradients and shorter distances. Routes like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e871766394/algar-waterfalls-trail" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Algar Waterfalls Trail&lt;/a&gt; are particularly popular for their natural swimming opportunities, while coastal paths offer engaging scenery for all ages.

Q: What do other hikers enjoy most about hiking in Central?
A: The easy hiking trails in Central are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.4 stars from over 5,400 reviews. Hikers frequently praise the diverse scenery, from stunning coastal views to peaceful reservoir paths, and appreciate the accessibility of the routes for various fitness levels.

Q: What is the best time of year for easy hikes in Central?
A: Central generally offers pleasant hiking conditions year-round, thanks to its mild climate. Spring and autumn are particularly ideal, with comfortable temperatures and vibrant natural scenery. Even in winter, many easy coastal and reservoir trails remain enjoyable, while summer mornings and evenings are best for avoiding the midday heat.

Q: Are there easy hikes accessible by public transport?
A: Yes, several easy hikes in Central are accessible via public transport, especially those starting from urban centers like Alicante or coastal towns. For specific routes, it's recommended to check local bus or tram schedules to plan your journey to the trailhead.

Q: How long do easy hikes in Central typically take?
A: The duration of easy hikes in Central varies, but many can be completed within 1 to 2 hours. For instance, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e871766394/algar-waterfalls-trail" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Algar Waterfalls Trail&lt;/a&gt; takes about 27 minutes, while the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/40388677" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Albir Lighthouse – Cala de la Mina loop&lt;/a&gt; is typically completed in under 2 hours.

Q: Can I find easy hikes that offer views of the coastline or city skylines?
A: Definitely. Many easy trails in Central provide stunning coastal vistas and city skyline views. Routes like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/40388677" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Albir Lighthouse – Cala de la Mina loop&lt;/a&gt; offer beautiful sea views, and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/31408413" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Benidorm Marina – View of Benidorm's skyline loop&lt;/a&gt; provides panoramic cityscapes.
tips: The Rabasa lagoons are a very particular site in the city of Alicante. In the past they used to exploit the limestone area and at the end the quarries were left empty and when they filled with water they formed artificial lagoons. Due to the proximity to the city, they make an alternative getaway to the beach and the sea despite there not being many trees and therefore not much shade, it is a place to visit. Ideal for a walk with the family.
